mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reset is asserted after vout has accumulated charge
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_DISABLE_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_reset
P_NONOVERLAP_PHASES mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=phase_overlap
P_ERROR_REPORTING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_polarity

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: pump_en and one phase are high at a clock update
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_PUMP_REGULATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_gain
P_READY_QUALIFICATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=qualification_count_error
